sourceRows.Summary: Shows that confinement and Higgs regions can be analytically connected for fundamental Higgs fields, so phase-label language cannot by itself define the observed boson source.
sourceRows.PredictionImpact: Constrains source-law claims; does not derive W/Z/H masses.

sourceRows.Summary: Argues that spontaneous breaking of a local gauge symmetry is impossible without gauge fixing.
sourceRows.PredictionImpact: Blocks treating local gauge-symmetry breaking as the physical W/Z/H source law.

sourceRows.Summary: Provides a nonperturbative lattice framework and rigorous Higgs-mechanism treatment in gauge theories.
sourceRows.PredictionImpact: Useful complementarity boundary; still not GU-local prediction evidence.

sourceRows.Summary: Finds phase-diagram behavior consistent with Fradkin-Shenker expectations for fixed-length fundamental scalar fields.
sourceRows.PredictionImpact: Empirical lattice support for the boundary; not a source law.

sourceRows.Summary: Adds a gauge-invariant diagnostic stronger than massive color-singlet asymptotic states in theories with fundamental matter.
sourceRows.PredictionImpact: Suggests diagnostic structure, not W/Z/H source lineage.

sourceRows.Summary: Proposes a gauge-invariant distinction using custodial symmetry and varieties of confinement.
sourceRows.PredictionImpact: May guide observed-sector diagnostics, but imports model-specific global symmetry data.

sourceRows.FindingKind: Gauge-independent transition in SU(2) gauge-scalar lattice theory
sourceRows.Summary: Constructs gauge-invariant operators to separate confinement and Higgs regimes in a lattice SU(2) scalar model.
sourceRows.PredictionImpact: Modern operator lead; still lacks GU-native W/Z/H source, scale, and unit rows.

decision: Do not promote W/Z or Higgs physical masses from gauge-Higgs complementarity or Higgs-phase language. Elitzur and Fradkin-Shenker/Osterwalder-Seiler results make local gauge-symmetry breaking and phase labels insufficient as physical source laws; any viable route must instead supply GU-local gauge-invariant operators, observed-sector pole extraction, target-independent scale/coupling lineage, Higgs scalar-source lineage, and GeV normalization.
nextRequiredArtifact: A GU-local gauge-Higgs or equivalent operator system with gauge-invariant photon/W/Z/H observables.
A source-derived observed Hilbert sector, vacuum, and correlation-function pole extraction rule.
Target-independent W/Z mass scale, weak-mixing, gauge-coupling, scalar-source, and GeV-unit lineage.
A proof that any gauge-invariant Higgs/confinement diagnostic actually selects the observed electroweak W/Z/H sector rather than a phase-label convention.
